title: aglaia ouangliensis
intro: Aglaia ouangliensis is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the mango flower or the Ouangli tree. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aglaia ouangliensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a component of various remedies.
